Created production-ready brief with script structure, thumbnail ideas, viral mechanics. Estimated 3-5 hours production time, $20-40 cost. Directly supports 2-3 videos/week scaling goal.

lessonsLearned.lesson: No pagination = guaranteed failure at scale. Always implement pagination, deduplication, and virtual scrolling for data-heavy dashboards.
Learning cycle protocol requires reviewing conversations, updating STATE.json, doing one improvement, and spawning auditor - not just updating heartbeat counters.
Builder honesty verification is essential. Red team caught builder claiming fixes that didn't exist (OutlierRankedList, status filtering). Browser screenshots now required for all claimed fixes.
Value audit template produces consistent ratings. AI Agent research scored 82% - genuine proactive work with multi-source validation scores 80-100%.
